{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322052635E5F77F08FA51D641934E\"}"},"total":19050},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6947311211444912143","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看的第二遍的，相隔半年我又来了，牵挂在我心里很久了，重生小说很多，到这一部是我让我眼前一亮的\n \n 又加评了：四刷了，真的好好这部小说，可能对于其他人来说可能一般，但对我不知道有什么魔力，刷了一遍又一遍（虽然不是每次都一句一句的看），真的很喜欢男主对女主的偏爱（什么时候也能有人对我有这么明显偏爱），悲催"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1617546944,"group_id":"6750894588266810371","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"啊，打","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+md7q+V7kosEU+a7FBzEAQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/a63f2929fb6643d3832f59c9af7b3b3e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776707020\u0026x-signature=Ge%2FRcJpEhmNOPBK%2FpbJdbWSAhUc%3D","user_id":"958382806672845","user_name":"大大"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"958382806672845","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6750894588266810371","book_info":{"abstract":"药侯嫡女半夏，被姐姐跟心爱的太子哥哥谋害至死。再次醒来，重生到回都京的前几天。她带着上辈子的记忆，撕开姐姐的美人皮，揭穿继母的假菩萨面。都京传言说她乡下土包子，她比谁都潮流，说她是个村姑，她比谁都优雅。说她不识字，琴棋书画样样精通，说她傻，好吧扮猪吃老虎可懂？鄙夷她，不屑她，哎！讨厌的公子哥一个个扑过来，非要跟她生猴子。某太子，一脸的醋意：“说，你跟小将军消失一夜去哪了？”半夏无语：“跟你有关系？”“本殿是你的未婚夫。”“我有承认？”某太子黑沉着一张脸，只蹦出几个字。“舍不得杀你，却能灭他。”半夏气急吼道：“月北翼别忘了咱俩是仇人。”太子翼：“……”仇人？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/56330ecd5cc03fe82ae7b8c992995a35","author":"鬼月幽灵","author_id":"","book_id":"6750894588266810371","book_name":"重生嫡女归来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":246,\"name\":\"宫斗宅斗\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246\u0026name=宫斗宅斗\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":5,\"name\":\"古代言情\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5\u0026name=古代言情\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\ 甜宠 男强女强 就是有几个坑没填 但是不影响观看 就三把金钥匙来讲 男女主不需要那些财富 所以没有必要为了填坑特意去写 小皇子的后来没出现不代表没活着 说祖母他们都被救了 小皇子肯定也活着 这些我觉得交代的挺清楚的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641482825,"group_id":"6750894588266810371","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2A39FoZMemvZvGMR9lukvQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7c75fb914d2742a0aeb4791a3df6d9d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776708368\u0026x-signature=CPhSci97sAUuxHBwQ9RXTBJ1e6Y%3D","user_id":"83267060856","user_name":"月月Month"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"83267060856","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6750894588266810371","book_info":{"abstract":"药侯嫡女半夏，被姐姐跟心爱的太子哥哥谋害至死。再次醒来，重生到回都京的前几天。她带着上辈子的记忆，撕开姐姐的美人皮，揭穿继母的假菩萨面。都京传言说她乡下土包子，她比谁都潮流，说她是个村姑，她比谁都优雅。说她不识字，琴棋书画样样精通，说她傻，好吧扮猪吃老虎可懂？鄙夷她，不屑她，哎！讨厌的公子哥一个个扑过来，非要跟她生猴子。某太子，一脸的醋意：“说，你跟小将军消失一夜去哪了？”半夏无语：“跟你有关系？”“本殿是你的未婚夫。”“我有承认？”某太子黑沉着一张脸，只蹦出几个字。“舍不得杀你，却能灭他。”半夏气急吼道：“月北翼别忘了咱俩是仇人。”太子翼：“……”仇人？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/56330ecd5cc03fe82ae7b8c992995a35","author":"鬼月幽灵","author_id":"","book_id":"6750894588266810371","book_name":"重生嫡女归来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":246,\"name\":\"宫斗宅斗\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246\u0026name=宫斗宅斗\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":5,\"name\":\"古代言情\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5\u0026name=古代言情\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36\u0026name=重生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender
